MyAlpha

      Architecture that moves organisations forward

      MyAlpha helps financial services, wealth, and trading organisations design modern architectures, simplify complexity, and deliver technology that works.

      Services

      Enterprise & Solution Architecture

      Designing target-state architectures that reduce complexity, improve resilience, and accelerate delivery.

      Data & Technology Strategy

      Modernising data foundations and unlocking value.

      Delivery & Implementation

      Turning architecture into working software and operational capability.

      Governance, Risk & Compliance

      Ensuring technology decisions are safe, compliant, and aligned to organisational risk appetite.

      Case Studies

      • Multi-Venue Trading & FIX Routing Uplift
      • Digital Advice Platform Architecture
      • Data Platform Integration
      • Wealth Architecture Assessment
      • FIX Workflow Modernisation

      Founder
